title: Open general export licence military goods: for demonstration
body: "This open general export licence (OGEL) allows, subject to certain conditions, the export of some military goods for demonstration.  Reporting requirements  This OGEL is subject to reporting requirements under the open licence returns transparency initiative.  Revoked licences  The most recent revoked licence is available in the documents section.  You can find revoked versions of the open general export licence (military goods: for demonstration) on the National Archives website.  You can find older revoked versions of the open general export licence (military goods: for demonstration) - from December 2019 on the National Archives website.  "
